9:T3089,<div class="specification">
<p>A teacher is concerned about the amount of lesson time lost by <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mn>8</mn></math> students through arriving late at school. Over a period of <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mn>2</mn></math> weeks he records the total number of minutes they are late. He also asks them how far they live from school. The results are shown in the table below.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question">
<p>Which of the correlation coefficients would you recommend is used to assess whether or not there is an association between total number of minutes late and distance from school? Fully justify your answer.</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/topic/4/","children":["← back to topic ","4"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"EXN.2.SL.TZ0.1"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"AI"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","2"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"EXN"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","sl-4-4-pearsons-scatter-diagrams-eqn-of-y-on-x"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$9"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>Spearman’s rank correlation should be used         <strong>A1</strong></p>\n<p>Because the product moment correlation coefficient is distorted by an outlier.        <strong> R1</strong></p>\n<p> </p>\n<p><strong>Note:</strong> Do not award <strong>A1R0</strong></p>\n<p>  </p>\n<p><strong>[2 marks]</strong></p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n[N/A]\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
